# Sources namespace

Built-in and custom update sources for fetching release feeds and downloading assets.

## Classes

| Type | Summary |
| --- | --- |
| [`FileSource`](./FileSource.md) | A built-in update source that reads release feeds and downloads assets from a local file path. |
| [`GiteaSource`](./GiteaSource.md) | A built-in update source that reads release feeds and downloads assets from a Gitea repository. |
| [`GithubSource`](./GithubSource.md) | A built-in update source that reads release feeds and downloads assets from a GitHub repository. |
| [`GitlabSource`](./GitlabSource.md) | A built-in update source that reads release feeds and downloads assets from a GitLab repository. |
| [`HttpSource`](./HttpSource.md) | A built-in update source that reads release feeds and downloads assets from a remote HTTP URL. |
| [`IUpdateSource`](./IUpdateSource.md) | Abstract class for custom update sources. Subclass this and implement GetReleaseFeed and DownloadReleaseEntry to provide a custom way of fetching releases and downloading assets. |
| [`IUpdateSourcePointer`](./IUpdateSourcePointer.md) | Base class for all update sources. Holds a pointer to a Rust-side update source. |
| [`VelopackFlowSource`](./VelopackFlowSource.md) | A built-in update source that reads release feeds and downloads assets from Velopack Flow. |
